lemmas.primary_translation: suffix for inhabitant of a place

definitions.text: etterledd i betegnelse for person fra en dal eller fra stedet førsteleddet angir
definitions.translation: suffix in the designation of a person from a valley or from the place indicated by the first part of the word

definitions.text: i ord som namdaling, romsdaling og verdaling
definitions.translation: in words like namdaling, romsdaling, and verdaling
